CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Master Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF) Base A/B/C/D Version 2 (V2)
Version — March 2025
SAS name Label Type Length
BENE_ID Encrypted 723 Beneficiary ID CHAR 15
BENE_ENROLLMT_REF_YR Beneficiary Enrollment Reference Year NUM 4
SAMPLE_GROUP Medicare 1, 5, or 20% Strict Sample Group Indicator CHAR 2
ENHANCED_FIVE_PERCENT_FLAG Medicare Enhanced 5% Sample Indicator CHAR 1
CRNT_BIC_CD Current Beneficiary Identification Code CHAR 2
STATE_CD SSA
